ModMetaData.name: Retextured! - More Mechs
ModMetaData.author: Nalzurin, Soul, IcyCheeseCake
ModMetaData.description:
Retextured! is a series of retexture mods that aim to bring back old textures from select mods to modern standards. Vanilla friendly guaranteed.👍
This installment deals with retexturing More Mechanoids.
